word: H6075 - עָפַל - ʻâphal - aw-fal' - Be lifted up

sections.paragraph:
Original: עפל

Transliteration: ‛âphal

Phonetic: aw-fal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to lift up, swell, be lifted up
    1. (Pual) to swell
    2. (Hiphil) to be bold, be swelled
  2. to presume, be heedless
    1. (Hiphil) to be heedless, show heedlessness

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1662,1663

Part(s) of speech: Verb
